name: Feta Greek Salad
recipeIngredient: Feta cheese (1/2 lb, sliced or cut into chunks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill all vegetables, olives, and cheese.
2. Combine dressing ingredients: 1/4 cup olive oil, 2 tablespoons vinegar, 1 pinch of oregano, salt, and pepper to taste.
When ready to serve, toss the chilled vegetables and olives together. Top with the feta cheese and serve with the dressing.
